## Scroll class

Scrollable container that emits scroll related X Events. It exposes all the listeners and props from the [BaseScroll](./x-components.basescroll.md) component.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class Scroll extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue
